title: Creative Model Evaluation
description: Eight self-contained browser prototype prompts that exercise different model capabilities without external APIs or assets.

prompts.title: Midnight Dispatch Board
prompts.challenge: Build a dense fictional emergency-dispatch workspace where operators triage, assign, and close local incidents without any external data source.
requiredBehaviors: Filter and sort a deterministic incident queue
Multi-select rows and apply a bulk status change
Open an incident detail drawer without losing queue context
Edit priority and assignee inline with clear confirmation
Support keyboard shortcuts plus undo for the last mutation
testDimensions: Overflow and wrapping at narrow widths

prompts.title: Four Frames, One Memory
prompts.challenge: Create a tiny storyboard editor that turns four short local prompts into a coherent visual sequence using only inline SVG or CSS-built shapes.
requiredBehaviors: Reorder four scene cards with drag and drop
Select a scene and edit its caption and mood
Render each scene with a distinct deterministic abstract composition
Play the sequence as an interruptible timed story
Reset to the supplied starter storyboard
testDimensions: Motion timing with pause and reduced-motion fallback
Typography fit for short and long captions

prompts.title: Tidepool Logic Map
prompts.challenge: Design an SVG map puzzle where a player routes water from a spring through habitat nodes while avoiding blocked rocks and satisfying every marked requirement.
requiredBehaviors: Pan and zoom the diagram without losing the current selection
Drag nodes with snap-to-grid feedback
Draw, remove, and visually label connections
Highlight the active source-to-habitat path
Validate the graph and explain each unmet requirement
Provide a deterministic reset puzzle
testDimensions: Spatial hit testing and connector precision
Visual layering of nodes, edges, and hazards

prompts.title: Greenhouse at Dusk
prompts.challenge: Build a self-contained terrarium simulator in which daily light, water, and temperature choices change plant health over time and persist locally.
requiredBehaviors: Advance a day and apply deterministic resource effects
Show health, moisture, and growth changes immediately
Offer one-step undo and a full restart
Persist progress through a page refresh with localStorage
Surface a readable consequence log for each action

prompts.title: Keyline Cartography
prompts.challenge: Create a keyboard-first map editor where every tile, tool, and result can be completed without a pointer and all status changes are announced semantically.
requiredBehaviors: Navigate a tile grid with arrow keys and roving focus
Use visible shortcuts to place, erase, and inspect markers
Trap and restore focus in the tool palette dialog
Announce selection, errors, and completion in a live region
Respect prefers-reduced-motion and preserve focus after rerenders
Expose meaningful accessible names and descriptions

prompts.title: Pocket Planetarium
prompts.challenge: Build an interactive constellation postcard that reflows from a roomy desktop composition to a one-column phone layout while keeping the same core controls usable.
requiredBehaviors: Toggle between three deterministic constellation stories
Select a star to reveal its local legend
Resize or reorient the constellation view responsively
Keep controls reachable in both wide and narrow layouts
Provide a compact mobile summary instead of horizontal overflow

prompts.title: Archive of Unsent Letters
prompts.challenge: Make a local letter archive that deliberately cycles through loading, populated, empty-search, and recoverable-error states without any network request.
requiredBehaviors: Show a deterministic loading skeleton before content appears
Search into a populated archive and an explicit empty result state
Simulate a failed collection with retry and error explanation
Preserve the query and selected letter across state transitions
Offer a clear reset that returns to the initial archive

prompts.title: Lantern Run
prompts.challenge: Create a tiny deterministic canvas or DOM game where a firefly collects drifting lanterns, avoids shadow gaps, and can be played with keyboard or touch.
requiredBehaviors: Move the player with arrow keys and touch controls
Animate collectible and hazard motion without external assets
Track score, remaining time, pause, and restart
Show distinct ready, playing, win, and lose states
Keep gameplay playable with reduced motion enabled
Persist the best score only for the current browser
testDimensions: Responsive canvas scaling and touch ergonomics
